Bus Timings

F11 Bus Timetable Financial Center Metro Seaside Full Route Details

January 29, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F11 offers a vital connection across Dubai, linking several key areas with a consistent and reliable service. This bus route operates frequently throughout the day, providing an accessible transportation option for both daily commuters and occasional travelers. With stops at major landmarks and neighborhoods, Bus F11 ensures that passengers can easily reach various destinations within the city.

Route Name F11
Route Description Financial Center Metro Seaside
Total Distance Approximately 5-8 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 22 minutes
Operational Hours 04:09 to 00:47
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F11

Bus F11 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F11 operates with frequent departures throughout the day, ensuring flexibility and convenience for passengers. The bus runs from Financial Center Metro Seaside with the following timings:

From Financial Center Metro Seaside From Satwa Bus Station · 8
04:09 04:24
05:05 05:19
05:35 05:49
05:55 06:09
06:12 06:26

00:00 00:00
00:47  

Bus F11 Timetable

For detailed F11 bus timings, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link F11 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus F11 is based on the number of zones traveled. For a single zone, the fare is AED 3. This pricing structure is designed to be affordable and convenient for passengers traveling within Dubai. Additional charges apply for multiple zones, ensuring that the cost reflects the distance traveled. With these reasonable rates, Bus F11 offers an economical way to explore various parts of the city.

Bus Booking

Bus F11 does not require pre-booking, and passengers can board the bus at any designated stop along the route on a first-come, first-served basis. For real-time updates and route information, the RTA Dubai app is available, allowing travelers to track buses and plan their journeys more effectively.

Additional RTA Dubai bus routes you might want to explore include the X25, which travels between Karama Bus Station and Dubai Silicon Oasis, as well as the E400, connecting Ajman and Dubai.

Bus Route

The Bus F11 route covers a comprehensive network of stops, making it a crucial service for navigating Dubai.

  1. Financial Center Metro Seaside

  2. Wasl, Terminus

  3. Ghaya Residence

  4. Wasl, Masjid

  5. Wasl, School

  6. Wasl, Park

  7. Iranian Hospital

  8. Hudheiba, Road

  9. Bada

  10. Satwa Bus Station · 8

  11. Satwa, Masjid

  12. Satwa, Post Office

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Satwa, Roundabout

  2. Trade Center Metro Station

  3. White Crown Tower

  4. Emirates Tower Metro Seaside

  5. Rostamani Tower

  6. Financial Center Metro Seaside

The route then loops back to Financial Center Metro Seaside, completing a comprehensive circuit of the key areas it serves.

Bus F11 Station Overview

Financial Center Metro Seaside

The Financial Center Metro Seaside station is a prominent transit hub situated near the bustling financial district. This station provides a crucial link for commuters traveling to and from the central business area, making it a key stop for professionals and visitors.

It is strategically located to offer easy access to the nearby metro station, enhancing connectivity for those using both metro and bus services. The station features modern amenities such as comfortable seating and real-time updates, ensuring a smooth and efficient travel experience. Its location near major landmarks and commercial centers further adds to its significance as a major transit point in the city.

White Crown Tower Bus Stop Intersection

The White Crown Tower Bus Stop is a key transit point where Bus Routes 21, 98E, F11, and F28 intersect. This station offers passengers easy access to various destinations across Dubai, enhancing connectivity for both daily commuters and visitors. Its strategic location near important landmarks and commercial areas makes it a convenient stop for those traveling through the city, providing seamless transfers between these bus routes.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus F11 route in Dubai passes through several areas that feature notable attractions and destinations:

  1. Trade Center Metro Station: This area is close to the Dubai World Trade Centre, which hosts various international events, exhibitions, and conferences.

  2. The area also includes Zabeel Park, a large urban park offering green spaces and recreational activities.

3.

  1. Iranian Hospital: While primarily a healthcare facility, the Iranian Hospital is located near several residential and commercial areas where you can explore local shops and eateries.

  2. Dubai Modern School: This area is close to several residential neighborhoods and provides a glimpse into the local community’s lifestyle.

  3. Wasl Park: A green space in the Wasl area, ideal for outdoor activities and family gatherings.

  4. White Crown Tower and Rostamani Tower: These are prominent landmarks in the area, showcasing modern Dubai architecture.

Though not directly tourist attractions, the route offers access to some of Dubai’s notable landmarks and business districts, providing a glimpse of the city’s blend of modernity and culture.

Journey Experience

While the journey is lengthy, it provides a scenic and informative experience, showcasing a blend of Dubai’s modern attractions, business life, and recreational spaces.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Satwa Bus Station · 8, the furthest point on the F11 bus route starting from Financial Center Metro Seaside, for a price range of AED 22-25. This service offers a comfortable and efficient option for reaching the end of the F11 route, ensuring a smooth journey through Dubai’s vibrant districts.

Overall, Bus F11 provides a reliable and cost-effective option for navigating key areas in Dubai, ensuring easy access to major landmarks and neighborhoods. Whether you’re heading to work, school, or simply enjoying a day out, Bus F11 offers a seamless travel experience across Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
